task:
Fix design/functional mismatches on the Kudos Live Board (/kudos) reported by the user against the MoMorph reference: banner rendered far shorter than designed (no vertical padding, image squeezed into a thin strip), the top-level 'Tim kiem profile Sunner' search box was entirely missing, Highlight carousel cards had visibly uneven heights (prev/active/next), kudos content showed literal '

...

' HTML tags as text instead of rendering formatted content, and the Spotlight board had no decorative background. Root-cause investigation also surfaced a latent bug: the page body background depended on prefers-color-scheme (white on a light-mode browser) instead of the app's fixed dark theme.
acceptanceCriteria: Sunner search box ('Tim kiem profile Sunner') is present and visible next to the compose entry bar

Kudos card content renders as real HTML (no literal

or

substrings visible in rendered text)
Highlight carousel peek cards are proportionally scaled from the active card, not reflow-drifted to a different natural height
Page body background is the fixed dark theme (#00101a), not dependent on prefers-color-scheme
Banner container height matches its background asset's natural aspect ratio (1440x512) instead of collapsing to ~158px
Spotlight board canvas has a decorative background image instead of a bare solid color
blastRadius: F001 compose-flow e2e test (e2e/kudos.spec.ts) — accessible-name collisions from the new SunnerSearchBar combobox and the pre-existing pill-styled compose trigger
Every page using the shared body background (all routes, via app/globals.css)
contracts: sanitizeKudosContentHtml(html: string): string — allowlist-only HTML sanitizer matching kudos-editor.tsx's Tiptap schema (StarterKit + Link + Mention), browser-only (DOMParser)
